abort.already_configured: This RF listener is already configured.
abort.already_in_progress: Discovery of this sensor is already in progress.

user.title: 433MHz Weather Station – RTL_433
user.description: Activate the RF listener. Once enabled, any 433 MHz sensor decoded by RTL_433 on your ESPHome device will be discovered automatically and offered for setup here.

confirm_discovery.title: New RF Sensor Discovered
